title: News from around the league this month
content: A few quick notes for Millvale Youth Baseball League families. Sign-ups are rolling in, the equipment shed is stocked, and we added two new outfield-fence sponsors. Coach Joyce will post the full team rosters soon.
excerpt: A few quick notes for league families this month — read more inside.

title: Notes from setting the spring schedule
content: We spent the week laying out the spring schedule at Millvale Community Park. Games are Saturday mornings with weeknight practices, and we kept travel light for the 7-to-10 crowd. Rain dates are built in and the full calendar is on the schedule page.
excerpt: How Coach Joyce mapped out the spring schedule — read more inside.

title: Three wins worth sharing from the weekend
content: Three things to celebrate from the weekend: the boys turned their first double play, Jake went 3-for-3 at the plate, and every player got an inning in the field. Great effort all around at Millvale Community Park.
excerpt: Three things to celebrate from the weekend at the ballfield — read more inside.

title: A look at the season ahead
content: Here is what the Millvale Youth Baseball League has lined up: opening day this spring, a mid-season skills clinic, team photos, and the end-of-season party. Coach Joyce is looking forward to another great year at the park.
excerpt: What the league has lined up for the season ahead — read more inside.

title: Field notes from the dugout
content: A few field notes from the dugout this week. We worked on base running and cutoffs, and the kids are starting to call for the ball on pop flies. Bring water and a cap for the warmer evenings at Millvale Community Park.
excerpt: Field notes from the dugout after this week's practices — read more inside.

title: Why we moved practice times this spring
content: A heads-up for families: we moved weeknight practices a little later so kids can get home from school and grab a snack first. Coach Joyce and the parent volunteers settled on 6 pm at Millvale Community Park. Let us know if that causes any trouble.
excerpt: Why weeknight practices moved a little later this spring — read more inside.

title: St. Nicholas fish fry is back on Fridays
content: Good news for the neighborhood: the St. Nicholas parish fish fry runs again on Friday evenings through Lent. Baked and fried fish, pierogies, and haluski, with proceeds going to the parish food pantry. Doors open at 4 in the parish hall.
excerpt: The St. Nicholas Friday fish fry returns this season — read more inside.

title: Parish food pantry could use canned goods
content: The St. Nicholas food pantry is a little short heading into winter. Canned vegetables, soup, and peanut butter are always welcome, and the collection bin is by the side door of the church. Thank you, Millvale — you always come through.
excerpt: How to help the parish food pantry this winter — read more inside.

title: Millvale borough leaf pickup schedule
content: A quick community note: the borough runs curbside leaf pickup through the end of the month. Bag the leaves and have them out by the curb on your regular collection day. The list of streets is posted at the borough building on Grant Avenue.
excerpt: Borough leaf pickup dates for Millvale residents — read more inside.

title: St. Nicholas feast day celebration recap
content: The parish feast day Mass and the reception afterward were a wonderful turnout this year. Father Mike blessed the children, the Knights of Columbus ran the coffee-and-donuts, and the choir sounded terrific. A nice reminder of what this little parish means to Millvale.
excerpt: A look back at the St. Nicholas feast day celebration — read more inside.

title: Volunteers wanted for the Millvale holiday parade
content: The borough is lining up volunteers for the holiday parade down Grant Avenue. They need a few folks for setup, crossing spots, and cleanup. If a couple of the ballplayers' families want to walk with a league banner, that would be a fun way to take part.
excerpt: Help wanted for the Millvale holiday parade — read more inside.
